1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
2.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

2.gl: properly, to build up or support; to foster as a parent or nurse; figuratively to render (or be) firm or faithful, to trust or believe, to be permanent or quiet; morally to be true or certain;
2.kj: hence, assurance, believe, bring up, establish, [phrase] fail, be faithful (of long continuance, stedfast, sure, surely, trusty, verified), nurse, (-ing father), (put), trust, turn
2.dv: a primitive root; (Isaiah 30:21; interchangeable with H541 (אָמַן), to go to the right hand)

2.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
2.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

2.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
2.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
godly (man), good, holy (one), merciful, saint, (un-) godly.

3.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
3.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
3.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

3.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
3.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

3.gl: the lip (as a natural boundary); by implication, language; by analogy, a margin (of a vessel, water, cloth, etc.)
3.kj: band, bank, binding, border, brim, brink, edge, language, lip, prating, (sea-)shore, side, speech, talk, (vain) words.
3.dv: or (in dual and plural) שֶׂפֶת; probably from H5595 (סָפָה) or H8192 (שָׁפָה) through the idea of termination (compare H5490 (סוֹף));

3.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
3.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

3.gl: evil (as destructive), literally (ruin) or morally (especially guile); figuratively idolatry (as false, subjective), uselessness (as deceptive, objective; also adverbially, in vain)
3.dv: or שַׁו; from the same as H7722 (שׁוֹא) in the sense of desolating;

3.gl: properly, smoothness; figuratively, flattery; also an allotment
3.kj: field, flattering(-ry), ground, parcel, part, piece of land (ground), plat, portion, slippery place, smooth (thing).

4.gl: to cut (off, down or asunder); by implication, to destroy or consume; specifically, to covenant (i.e. make an alliance or bargain, originally by cutting flesh and passing between the pieces)
4.kj: be chewed, be con-(feder-) ate, covenant, cut (down, off), destroy, fail, feller, be freed, hew (down), make a league (covenant), [idiom] lose, perish, [idiom] utterly, [idiom] wan

4.gl: the lip (as a natural boundary); by implication, language; by analogy, a margin (of a vessel, water, cloth, etc.)

4.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

4.gl: the tongue (of man or animals), used literally (as the instrument of licking, eating, or speech), and figuratively (speech, an ingot, a fork of flame, a cove of water)
4.kj: [phrase] babbler, bay, [phrase] evil speaker, language, talker, tongue, wedge.

4.gl: great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent

5.dv: or (in dual and plural) שֶׂפֶת; probably from H5595 (סָפָה) or H8192 (שָׁפָה) through the idea of termination (compare H5490 (סוֹף));

5.gl: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix
5.kj: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.
5.dv: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,

5.gl: the tongue (of man or animals), used literally (as the instrument of licking, eating, or speech), and figuratively (speech, an ingot, a fork of flame, a cove of water)
5.kj: [phrase] babbler, bay, [phrase] evil speaker, language, talker, tongue, wedge.
5.dv: or לָשֹׁן; also (in plural) feminine לְשֹׁנָה; from H3960 (לָשַׁן);

5.gl: to be strong; by implication, to prevail, act insolently
5.kj: exceed, confirm, be great, be mighty, prevail, put to more (strength), strengthen, be stronger, be valiant.
lord, master, owner. Compare also names beginning with 'Adoni-'.
5.dv: or (shortened) אָדֹן; from an unused root (meaning to rule);

6.gl: to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)

6.gl: to place (in a very wide application)
6.kj: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, [idiom] look, make, mark, put (on), [phrase] regard, set, shew, be stayed, [idiom] take.

6.gl: to puff, i.e. blow with the breath or air; hence, to fan (as a breeze), to utter, to kindle (a fire), to scoff
6.kj: blow (upon), break, puff, bring into a snare, speak, utter.

6.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
6.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

7.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
7.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
7.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

7.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
7.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

7.gl: to fuse (metal), i.e. refine (literally or figuratively)
7.kj: cast, (re-) fine(-er), founder, goldsmith, melt, pure, purge away, try.

7.gl: pure (in a physical, chemical, ceremonial or moral sense)
probably a crucible (as working over the metal)
7.dv: from H5953 (עָלַל) in the sense of completing;
or אֶמְרָה; feminine of H561 (אֵמֶר), and meaning the same

8.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
8.kj: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of t

8.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you

8.gl: properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e. guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc.
8.kj: beward, be circumspect, take heed (to self), keep(-er, self), mark, look narrowly, observe, preserve, regard, reserve, save (self), sure, (that lay) wait (for), watch(-man).

8.gl: to guard, in a good sense (to protect, maintain, obey, etc.) or a bad one (to conceal, etc.)
8.kj: besieged, hidden thing, keep(-er, -ing), monument, observe, preserve(-r), subtil, watcher(-man).

Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
